EOF

Bash(cd /c/Users/zaghdoud/aleweb && git add postcss.config.mjs && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix Payload admin CSS: skip Tailwind PostCSS for Payload files

Tailwind v4's @tailwindcss/postcss plugin was processing Payload CMS's
SCSS output and stripping @layer payload-default declarations, producing
a 1-byte empty CSS chunk. The admin panel loaded completely unstyled.

Use PostCSS function config to conditionally skip the Tailwind plugin
for @payloadcms files, letting Payload's CSS pass through unmodified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/zaghdoud/aleweb && git add postcss.config.mjs postcss-tailwind-skip-payload.cjs && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix Payload admin CSS: wrapper plugin to skip Tailwind for Payload files

Next.js rejects function-form PostCSS configs, so a wrapper plugin is
used instead. The wrapper intercepts @tailwindcss/postcss and returns
early for @payloadcms files, preventing Tailwind v4 from stripping
Payload's @layer declarations and producing empty CSS chunks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/zaghdoud/aleweb && git add src/app/\\\(payload\\\)/layout.tsx postcss.config.mjs && git rm postcss-tailwind-skip-payload.cjs && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix Payload admin CSS: import pre-compiled styles from @payloadcms/next

Root cause: Payload's RootLayout TypeScript source imports
@payloadcms/ui/scss/app.scss, but the compiled JS strips this
side-effect import. The CSS import only exists in .d.ts files
which bundlers don't process, leaving the admin panel unstyled.

Fix: explicitly import @payloadcms/next/css in the admin layout,
which provides a 304KB pre-compiled CSS file with all admin styles.

Also reverts the unnecessary PostCSS wrapper plugin and restores
the original PostCSS config.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" 2>&1)
